info.title: Official Information — BLACKCOIN
info.intro: The <1>BLACKCOIN</1> team is actively developing the project, with many major features currently in progress.

about.title: About the Project
about.text1: BLACKCOIN is an international collaborative initiative launched on March 21, 2024, aiming to build a strong, transparent, and sustainable digital ecosystem.
about.text2: To access the Whitepaper, Roadmap, and Privacy Policy, please visit our official website.

communication.title: Official Communication
communication.text1: All official information, updates, and important announcements regarding BLACKCOIN are published exclusively through our official website and social media channels.
communication.text2: We strongly encourage you to verify information through our official channels to avoid any confusion.

info.footer: Thank you for being part of BLACKCOIN’s evolution.
